meaning: n.<西>君,先生(西班牙语冠于男子姓名前),阁下,(英国剑桥或牛津大学)指导教师vt.穿上
examples: As a fund-raiser, police officers will don aprons, take orders and bus tables today.
I don' know no kings, Tom.
Don and Julie paid for it themselves.
"We don't have enough money to record things that sound contemporary, " he says, laughing.
"Where he is next season, I don't know, it's not for us to say, " he said.
